balanced_preference_summary.positive_result: Balanced local preferences remove the 18-E no-arbitration tie for near-threshold local forks while keeping global preference sum zero.
balanced_preference_summary.remaining_blocker: This is local symmetry breaking by declared epsilon, not native LGRC choice selection, RC identity collapse, or agency.
